title: This past year has been tremendously painful for all of us, and particularly in the Asian American community. The pandemic has hurt so many of us and turned our lives upside down,

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A historic $156.6 million has been secured to invest in uplifting Asian Americans and tackle root causes of hatred.",
    "$110 million of the funding will go to community organizations providing victim services and prevention.",
    "$10 million will support Stop AAPI Hate for tracking, responding to, and preventing incidents of racial bias and harm.",
    "$10 million will be allocated to the AAPI Data project for accurate data collection on AAPI needs and challenges.",
    "$10 million will provide funding for restorative justice programs in schools to address hate and macroaggressions.",
    "$5 million will support a peer social media network project addressing bullying and mental health for children and youth.",
    "$1.5 million will go towards a workgroup addressing education attainment for low-income, first-generation AAPI college students.",
    "$10 million will be allocated to ethnic media outlets to reach AAPI and other underserved communities in California.",
    "The education budget includes the highest level of school and per-pupil funding in California’s history at $123.9 billion.",
    "California aims for universal pre-kindergarten by 2025.",
    "$3 billion is allocated to convert school sites into full-service community schools with mental health and social services.",
    "$1 billion is earmarked for summer and after-school programs at all schools.",
    "$150 million is the increased funding for the Career Technical Education Incentive Grant for a total of $300 million ongoing.",
    "$86.4 million will be allocated for career technical education regional occupational centers."
  ]
}
```
